Stage.description: One node in a pipeline DAG.

depends_on.description: Ids of stages that must complete before this one runs. Empty for root stages.
depends_on.title: Depends On

id.description: Unique (within the pipeline) stage id, e.g. 'extract_entities'.
id.title: Id

metadata.description: Free-form, product-specific extras. Not validated beyond being a JSON object — see docs/trace-format.md for the recommended 'category' key convention.
metadata.title: Metadata

model.description: LiteLLM-style model identifier for the benchmark run, e.g. 'gpt-4o-2024-08-06'.
model.title: Model

prompt_template.description: Prompt template with {{variable}} placeholders resolved from upstream stage outputs.
prompt_template.title: Prompt Template

system_prompt.description: Optional system prompt for this stage, kept separate from prompt_template (which is the user/task prompt). Null if the stage's source didn't capture one.
system_prompt.title: System Prompt

Stage.title: Stage

StageParams.description:
Model call parameters for a stage.

All fields are optional — a stage need not pin every knob, and the
optimizer (a later phase) is exactly the thing that searches this space.
``extra="allow"`` because target models sometimes expose provider-specific
knobs (e.g. ``top_k``, ``reasoning_effort``) that we want to pass through
without widening this schema for every provider.

format_mode.description: Preferred output format/wrapping for this stage's prompt.
format_mode.title: Format Mode

StageParams.title: StageParams

StageRecord.description: One stage's execution within one trace.

cost.description: Actual $ cost of this stage's model call, if known. Central to the product's cost-reduction pitch, but optional since not every trace source reports it (our own synthetic fixtures don't).
cost.title: Cost

documents.description: Plain-text supporting documents for this stage call (e.g. retrieved passages), unstructured — no per-document metadata/scoring, just the raw text.
documents.title: Documents

input.description: Resolved input variables fed into this stage's prompt template.
input.title: Input

latency_ms.description: Wall-clock latency of this stage's model call, in milliseconds, if known. Optional as of schema_version 1.1 — not every trace source reports it.
latency_ms.title: Latency Ms

metadata.description: Free-form, product-specific extras. Not validated beyond being a JSON object — see docs/trace-format.md for the recommended 'category' key convention.
metadata.title: Metadata

output.description: The raw model output/completion text for this stage.
output.title: Output

rendered_prompt.description: The exact prompt text sent to the model.
rendered_prompt.title: Rendered Prompt

stage_id.description: Must match a Stage.id in the pipeline this trace belongs to.
stage_id.title: Stage Id

tokens.description: Token accounting for this call, if the trace source captured it. Optional as of schema_version 1.1 — not every trace source reports per-call token usage.

StageRecord.title: StageRecord

TokenUsage.description:
Token accounting for a single stage call.

Field names use the ``in``/``out``/``thinking`` JSON keys from the plan
(``tokens{in, out, thinking}``) via aliases, since ``in`` is a reserved
word in Python. ``populate_by_name=True`` means either the alias or the
Python attribute name works when constructing from Python.

in.description: Input/prompt tokens consumed by this stage call.
in.title: In

out.description: Output/completion tokens produced by this stage call.
out.title: Out

thinking.description: Reasoning/thinking tokens, if the model exposes them. Omit or null otherwise.
thinking.title: Thinking

TokenUsage.title: TokenUsage

Trace.description: One full DAG execution — all stage records for a single benchmark query.

metadata.description: Free-form, product-specific extras. Not validated beyond being a JSON object — see docs/trace-format.md for the recommended 'category' key convention.
metadata.title: Metadata

query.description: The original input to the pipeline for this benchmark query.
query.title: Query

Trace.title: Trace

description: Top-level ingest document: a pipeline definition plus its benchmark traces.

schema_version.description: Trace-format schema version. "1.0" files still validate — 1.1 only adds/relaxes fields (tokens/latency_ms optional, plus documents/metadata/system_prompt).
schema_version.title: Schema Version

title: TraceFile
